spec_match.rationale: Perfect demonstration of text-fit: contain solving the e-commerce problem of variable-length currency pricing fitting in a fixed-size container.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, featuring toggles for the text-fit state, a dynamic currency selector, and a custom product-card generator.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index blurb aligns exactly with the interactive e-commerce product grid shown in the demo.

edge_cases.rationale: The card adder and currency selector let users immediately stress-test extreme prices, and a custom JS polyfill is active to emulate behavior in older browsers.

references.rationale: The parent index includes the required ChromeStatus entry, though a direct reference list on this concept page itself is missing.

design_system.rationale: Conforms seamlessly to the global design system, including color variables, layout, and typographic styles.

openQuestions.title: Add direct spec / ChromeStatus reference link to concept page
openQuestions.detail: This concept page relies on the parent index for spec references. Adding a dedicated references list containing direct links to the ChromeStatus entry and CSS Text 4 draft will make this demo self-contained.

summary: A brilliant, practical demonstration of CSS text-fit: contain in an e-commerce product grid. It is highly interactive, handles non-supporting browsers via a well-written JS ResizeObserver polyfill, and perfectly solves real-world layout clipping. A minor enhancement would be adding direct spec references.
